attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00002, derived from source AUC-002) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket.

Source note is written from an in-person clinician's point of view (McBurney's tenderness, Rovsing's/psoas/obturator signs, IM medications administered); presentation layer was de-anchored to patient-reportable content only, with all examination findings sealed into 10/11 as telehealth-unobtainable.
Vitals were clinician-measured in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered (not patient-obtainable via telehealth) — omitted rather than fabricated as patient-reported readings.

Two candidate 'snomed_code' placeholder entries in 10_ground_truth_node differential_progression (mesenteric adenitis stage-1 and stage-2 entries) were left as non-numeric internal placeholders during drafting and must be corrected to real SNOMED candidates or omitted before this bundle is treated as final — flagged for review.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible adult age (28) consistent with 'lives alone, relies on public transport' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
